workers.label: Backend API contract
workers.focus: Implement or extend the owning router module for this gap route. Use SEARCH/REPLACE patches only — never rewrite whole files. For vector-store routes use gateway_rag.py, not gateway.py.

workers.label: Backend tests
workers.focus: Add focused pytest for the gap route: allow and deny paths, abuse cases, regression coverage. Use TestClient(app) from app.main. Mirror test_gateway_rag.py patterns.

workers.label: Operator UI
workers.focus: Wire control-center UI when API inventory marks Partial/Gap. Use component partials; preserve accessibility and existing nav patterns.

workers.label: Governance alignment
workers.focus: Update API inventory, UI coverage map, and risk register when behavior or privileged actions change. Never shrink governance files.

workers.label: Security Architect review
workers.focus: Review merged proposal for authz, least privilege, trust boundaries, and production-safe defaults. Flag BLOCKER if unsafe.

workers.label: Audit Architect review
workers.focus: Verify mutation audit, deny-path evidence, and traceability for changed endpoints.

workers.label: CISO review
workers.focus: Assess blast radius, residual risk, compensating controls, and go/no-go recommendation.

workers.label: Cloud Engineer review
workers.focus: Validate deployability, rollback, observability hooks, rate limits, and operational runbook impact.
